_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Keeping actively informed of industry developments to make creative and cost-effective use of emerging technologies and tools, aligned with business goals and user needs.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in evaluating emerging data and AI technologies for strategic relevance, assessing maturity, organizational fit, competitive impact, and integration requirements before recommending investment.
comments: DDaT skill superset of WIDAI LS domain. LS-S-011 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-S-007 (DQ, cosine: 0.567), OP-A-003 (OP, cosine: 0.551).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.4/10 (raw 0.444). Shared vocabulary: [emerging, technologies]. DDaT-only terms [actively, aligned, business, cost, creative, developments] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, assessing, competitive, data, evaluating, fit] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.872 (P=0.872, R=0.873). Balanced P/R — the 24-word DDaT element and 23-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Keeping actively informed of industry developments to make creative and cost-eff" and "Skill in evaluating emerging data and AI technologies for strategic relevance, a" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.507 > STS 0.444 (gap +0.063). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [emerging, technologies] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.3%. Shared tokens: [emerging, technologies]. DDaT-only: [actively, aligned, business, cost, creative, developments]. WIDAI-only: [ai, assessing, competitive, data, evaluating, fit].

signals.detail: STS 0.444 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
